item.title: EWS Support in Thunderbird
item.description: Updates meta bug bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi Updates on blog blog.thunderbird.net/tag/exchange/ Bugs no folders to browse with on-prem EWS bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi ...

item.title: iptables
item.description: Tables and Chains TBD IP sets ipset expresses complex IP addresses and port based rulesets with one single iptables rule, making it very efficient compared to multiple iptable rules. ...

item.title: TCP Handshake
item.description: Terminology Numbers Sequence Number: 32 bits The sequence number of the first data octet in this segment (except when SYN is present). If SYN is present the sequence number is the initial sequence number (ISN) and the first data octet is ISN+1.

item.title: VMware Fusion and Workstation
item.description: On November 11, 2024, Broadcom announced that VMware Fusion and Workstation will be available for free to everyone. However, until a new release is made, VMware Fusion Pro still says “Licensed for Personal Use only.” You can download binaries for free from support.broadcom.com/group/ecx/downloads.

item.title: Global DNS Lookup and Ping Services
item.description: Web DNS github.com/ccbikai/DNS.Surf Ping ping.pe/ (DNS resolution is performed once in central location) globalping.io/ (max 500 endpoints per run, limited to 100000 per hour ...

item.title: Navidrome
item.description: Navidrome is a music collection server compatible to Subsonic API. Clients Amperfy (iOS) If you experienced playback issues since Amperfy v1.2.1, first make sure your device can decode your music files natively, then in Settings, set streaming and cache format to “Raw/Original” to fix the issues.

item.title: Linux kernel mailing lists
item.description: Web viewers lore.kernel.org/ (display a full thread with /T/ suffix in URL) .
